title: Select exact first LilyGO board and acquire hardware
description: Why this exists: LilyGO is a family, not a single target. Bring-up needs one exact first board/revision to avoid mixing T-Beam, T-Deck, T-Echo-like, LoRa32, and Supreme assumptions. What needs to be done: choose the first LilyGO board for LICHEN bring-up based on availability, Zephyr viability, Meshtastic support, radio chip, display/input needs, BLE/USB support, GNSS/battery/power features, and contributor accessibility. Confirm whether physical hardware is in hand; if not, create or link a hardware-access blocker. Acceptance criteria: exact board name, revision, MCU, radio, display, buttons/keyboard, GNSS, PMIC/battery, USB/UART/BLE capabilities, and source links are recorded; hardware owner/location is recorded or blocker Bead exists; non-selected LilyGO candidates are noted with reason.
notes: Hardware availability update from 2026-06-30: user has a LilyGO T-Deck available. Treat LilyGO T-Deck as the first concrete LilyGO bring-up board unless hardware research discovers a blocking revision mismatch. Prioritize T-Deck ESP32-S3 + SX1262 board files, T-Deck display/input/keyboard path, and T-Deck flashing/smoke-test procedure before other LilyGO variants.
